channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-03
item.description: A new study in Molecular Pharmaceutics reveals that molecular dynamics simulations of two Fab antibody fragments can pinpoint hotspot interactions that improve predictive models of protein aggregation kinetics. | MoM2 is a new web-accessible tool for predicting zinc-binding sites in protein 3D structures. | A new study in PNAS reveals that the length of a person's cellular circadian clock may be linked to Alzheimer's disease and brain aging.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: A new study in Molecular Pharmaceutics reveals that molecular dynamics simulations of two Fab antibody fragments can pinpoint hotspot interactions that improve predictive models of protein aggregation kinetics. | MoM2 is a new web-accessible tool for predicting zinc-binding sites in protein 3D structures. | A new study in PNAS reveals that the length of a person's cellular circadian clock may be linked to Alzheimer's disease and brain aging.
